channel.title: Steven Garcia — Dealership AI Automation Blog
channel.description: Articles on dealership management, AI automation for car dealers, and sales process from a New Car Manager running 200+ units/month.

item.title: n8n for Car Dealers: The Self-Hosted Automation Platform Nobody Talks About
item.description: How a New Car Manager uses n8n to automate social media posting, content pipelines, and data workflows at a 200-unit Kia store. Free, self-hosted, no vendor lock-in.

item.title: 5 Ways I Save 2 Hours a Day as a Car Sales Manager
item.description: I tracked where my time went for a week. Reports, CRM cleanup, email, data entry, dashboards. Two hours a day gone before I managed a single person. Here are the 5 automations that gave me that time back.

item.title: AI for Car Dealerships: What Actually Works in 2026
item.description: Most AI-for-dealerships content is written by vendors selling you something. I'm a manager who built it myself. Here's what actually works, what doesn't, and what it costs.

item.title: BDC Automation for Car Dealers: What Works and What's a Waste
item.description: Real BDC automation results from a 200-unit Kia store. What actually works: follow-up sequences, task triage, response monitoring. What's a waste: chatbots, generic drips.

item.title: Why Most Dealer AI Tools Fail (And What to Do Instead)
item.description: Most vendor AI tools fail at dealerships because they're bolted onto broken processes. A New Car Manager's take on why dashboards don't work and what dealers actually need.

item.title: The Follow-Up System That Replaced 2 BDC Reps
item.description: How one dealership manager built an automated follow-up system handling task triage, SMS re-engagement, and internet lead monitoring. 847 tasks triaged, 790 auto-cleared.

item.title: The Exact VinSolutions Automation Stack I Run in Production
item.description: The full VinSolutions automation stack running at a 200-unit Kia store. Browser automation, task triage, re-engagement texts, morning reports — every piece explained.

item.title: I Had 847 CRM Tasks. AI Cleared 790 of Them.
item.description: Every dealership manager knows the VinSolutions task wall. 847 tasks, most are noise. My AI clears the junk, texts cold leads, and flags the real ones.

item.title: How I Automated My Morning Report
item.description: I used to spend 45 minutes pulling numbers from VinSolutions, vAuto, and kDealer every morning. Now a PDF hits my phone at 6:30am. Here's exactly how I built it.

item.title: The Dealership Morning Report: 21 Metrics That Replace Your Spreadsheet
item.description: How to build a one-page morning report that replaces 30 minutes of manual data collection. 21 metrics, 5 minutes, every day.

item.title: How I Use AI to Run a 200-Unit Kia Store
item.description: The AI stack a New Car Manager uses daily to automate BDC follow-up, morning reports, and CRM tasks at a 200+ unit Kia store.

item.title: The Save-a-Deal Meeting: A 10-Minute Format That Catches Every Missed Deal
item.description: A 10-minute morning meeting format that surfaces every unsold customer, missed T/O, and pending finance deal. No prep required.
